---
name: Content edit
about: An event, contact, or text needs updating
title: '[content] '
labels: content
---

## What needs to change

- Section (events / contacts / locale.uk / locale.en / other):
- Exact text / value before:
- Exact text / value after:

## Why

One sentence is fine.

## Both languages?

- [ ] I updated `locale.uk.toml`
- [ ] I updated `locale.en.toml`
- [ ] Locale parity gate (I29a) will still pass

(If you don't have a local machine to verify, the maintainer will.)
